message.content:
@startuml
participant Actor as Actor
participant CatERingAppManager.eventManager: EventManager as EventManager
participant eventManager.currentEvent: Event as currentEvent
participant r:EventReceiver as EventReceiver

Actor -> EventManager : assignData(name, date, location, numberOfParticipants, serviceType, topologyNote)

alt [currentEvent == null]
    EventManager -> Actor : Throw UseCaseLogicException
    alt
        EventManager -> currentEvent : setName(name)
        currentEvent -> EventManager : setName(name)
        EventManager -> currentEvent : setDate(date)
        currentEvent -> EventManager : setDate(date)
        EventManager -> currentEvent : setLocation(location)
        currentEvent -> EventManager : setLocation(location)
        EventManager -> currentEvent : setNumberOfParticipants(numberOfParticipants)
        currentEvent -> EventManager : setNumberOfParticipants(numberOfParticipants)
        EventManager -> currentEvent : setServiceType(serviceType)
        currentEvent -> EventManager : setServiceType(serviceType)
        EventManager -> currentEvent : setTipologyNote(topologyNote)
        currentEvent -> EventManager : setTipologyNote(topologyNote)
    end
    EventManager -> EventReceiver : notifyDataAssigned(currentEvent)
    EventReceiver -> EventManager : notifyDataAssigned(currentEvent)
end

@enduml
